name: 30oz Plastic Limitless Water Bottle: Black Reusable Portable Drinkware for Cold Beverages, Hand Wash, All Ages
description:
100% of Target’s 9th annual Black History Month collection was designed by Black founders and creators. Discover the Black founders and creators who inspire the next generation of Black creativity.

Carry your water with you wherever your day takes you with this 30oz Plastic Limitless Water Bottle. Made from black plastic with a pink plastic screw-on top, it's designed with the white text "Limitless" in block letters that tumble down the front of the bottle. Suitable for use with cold beverages only, this 30-ounce water bottle should be hand washed to clean.

Meet our Black artist partner Dennis! Dennis "Bagger43" Brown was born in the Philippines in 1983, and raised in parts of Asia (Japan, Okinawa, Hawaii & Philippines). Dennis studied Illustration at Ringling College of Art & Design 2001–2005. Currently Dennis resides in San Francisco, working full-time as a designer and in his free-time putting his energy toward developing works for gallery shows and other self-generated art projects.
